message:
bd-1av0.6: implement node:buffer shim with full Buffer class

Pure-JS Buffer extending Uint8Array with Node.js-compatible API:
from/alloc/concat/isBuffer/byteLength factory methods, encoding
support (utf8, base64, hex, latin1), write/copy/compare/equals/
indexOf/includes/fill/toJSON/slice, and integer read/write (LE/BE).
40 unit tests covering all acceptance criteria.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
